statement.en: Immunophenotyping of the blood and lungs in airway diseases at a single-cell resolution
statement.summary: The full abstract for this thesis is available in the body of the thesis, and will be available when the embargo expires.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: The submission is an embargoed thesis with no accessible abstract or content. Truth-value assessment of the axiom (immunophenotyping claims, methodology, findings) is observation-impossible until embargo expires. No evaluable proposition exists in the provided material.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 肺と血液を繋ぐ指数関数的な衰退が、個々の細胞のアイデンティティの和に等しい。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 二つの器官空間を繋ぐ細胞の交差対話、個々の点が免疫身元の輝きを放つ。
